news.t: Invesco Announces Changes to Four ETFs

overview.description: The Invesco AAA CLO Floating Rate Note ETF (ICLO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed to invest in USD-denominated floating rate CLOs that are rated AAA or equivalent. ICLO was launched on Dec 9, 2022 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco Announces Changes to Four ETFs
data.text: PBP, CQQQ and RYJ to reduce fees; fee waiver extended for ICLO ATLANTA , Jan. 4, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ), a leading global asset management firm, has announced that it will imple...
